calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2013 Set For Trial On Apr-18-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 611

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-18-2013 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Judge: Hon. Lynn O. Taylor, Judge (Ret.)
Court Clerk: Jose Rios Merida, Deputy Court Clerk III
Reporter: None

Deborah Honig, Attorney, SBN 69017, for Respondent/Plaintiff City and County of San Francisco Treasurer & tax collector
Rick Giambastini, Witness, for Respondent/Plaintiff City and County of San Francisco Treasurer & tax collector
Diana Ramirez, Witness, for Respondent/Plaintiff City and County of San Francisco Treasurer & tax collector

Olga Tikmenova, Appellant/Defendant, In Pro Per
Sergei Severinov, Witness, for Appellant/Defendant
Ivan Severinov, A Minor, Witness for Appellant/Defendant

The cause comes transferred forthwith from the master calendar for trial de novo.
Court reviews court file in chambers.

10:15 AM, In Open Court:
The case is called. All parties and witnesses are duly sworn.

Counsel for plaintiff/respondent makes an opening statement. Objection by defendant/appeallant is overruled.

Witness for Defendant/Appellant, Mr. Severinov's request to represent defendant/appellant party is argued and DENIED.

Subpoena Duces Tecum documents from San Francisco General Hospital are reviewed in open court.
appellant/defendant's motion in limine to preclude subpoena duces tecum is argued and granted in part. Granted as to category 3 granted. Granted as to category 4. Otherwise denied.

Plaintiff/respondent's motion to quash subpoena duces tecum is argued and set aside.

Defendant/appellant, Ms. Tikmenova makes an opening statement. Opening statement is interrupted for 5 minutes to allow time for plaintiff/respondent's attorney to confer with clients, per order of Court.

11:27 AM: Court declares recess.

11:45 AM: Court and all parties present, trial de novo is set aside and cause proceeds to settlement negotiations. Court meets separately with the parties in chambers. Parties reach resolution of case in its entirety with Court's assistance. Terms of settlement are stated in open court as follows:

Defendant/Appellant, Olga Tikhomova shall make final payment of $3,330.00, payable forthwith in full to the City and County of San Francisco's Tax Collecto; Plaintiff/Appellant shall file dismissal of its complaint with prejudice, with full release of all claims in writing to defendants/appellants, upon clearance of payment.

Defendant/Appellant makes payment in open court via check. Check No. 1218 is marked for identification as Court's Exhibit 1, by reference to the Court's case file.

11:50 AM: Trial de Novo is off calendar. Court adjourns.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-18-2013 Continued To Apr-18-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-15-2013 Continued To Apr-18-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
